recipe below (i measure w my heart) i had a lot of stuff already made like the salsa, guac, and meat so lmk if anyone wants to know how I made those!                                - leftover taco meat  - 4 eggs  - spices: pinch of salt pepper paprika  - tortilla chips  - mexican blend cheese  - 1 roma tomato - fresh cilantro  - salsa  - guacamole  - half a lime Cook meat until warmed up, add mixed egg with spices to pan and let cook for 3 min. Add tortilla chips, cheese, cilantro, and tomato and cover for 4 min. Mix and cover and let cook on low heat for 3 min. Plate and top with whatever you want/however much you want :).  #foodtok #migas #leftovers #food #tacos #asmr #funny #breakfast #fyp #foryou #recipe

i get a lot of questions from people asking if i felt nervous at the Olympics… yes!! of course i did! it was the biggest competition of my life. that being said, i also had years of training for my mind to overcome nerves and accept them as an opportunity for growth instead. i treated the games as a challenge to stay calm and do what i do at every meet: take one thing at a time. staying present in the moment has gotten me through a lot of tough moments in my career. i truly believe it can make all the difference in athletic ability. #athlete #trust #advice #nerves #sports #trending #fyp #trend

Happy Fall! #fall #foodtok #pasta #recipe #cook #cozyathome #pumpkinseason #fypシ                                                 ———-Recipe———— INGREDIENTS  - 2 cups cherry tomatoes  - 1 tbsp olive oil  - 1/4 cup heavy cream - 1/2 cup chicken broth  - 1 block feta  - 1 tsp salt  - 1/2 tsp pepper - 1/2 tsp basil  - 1/2 tsp oregano  - 1/2 tsp onion powder  - 1 pd spicy (or regular) sausage  - 1/4 cup chopped onion  - 1 large clove minced garlic  - 2 cups spinach  - 1 bag cheese tortellini  - 1/2 cup parmesan DIRECTIONS - Preheat oven to 425 degrees F  - Mix tomatoes, oil, and spices in glass pan - Place block feta in middle  - Add heavy cream and broth  - Bake for 20 min  - Cook sausage over medium heat with onion and oil  - Grill until brown  - Add spinach and garlic, simmer 2-3 min  - Add sausage mix to tomatoes and bake for 5 min  - Cook pasta for 2-3 min and add to glass pan  - Add parm and let cool for 10 min then serve :)
